title: Ailystyried dyfarniad
applicationTitle: Gwneud cais i ddyfarniad gael ei ailystyried
genericGuidanceRep: [W]Upload letters, photos or documents if they are relevant to the claimant’s application. Do not upload any other material.
contactApplicationTextRep: [W]Give details of the claimant’s application in the text box or upload a file

content.text: Defnyddiwch y ffurflen hon i wneud cais i ddyfarniad a wnaed gan dribiwnlys gael ei ailystyried. Gall hyn fod yn ddyfarniad a wnaed gan farnwr yn unig neu gan farnwr yn eistedd gydag aelodau nad ydynt yn gweithio yn y proffesiwn cyfreithiol.
Os yw’n angenrheidiol ailystyried dyfarniad er budd cyfiawnder, gallwch ofyn i’r tribiwnlys edrych ar y dyfarniad eto.

Dim ond dyfarniad sy’n penderfynu ar fater terfynol yn eich achos y gellir ei ailystyried. Mae hyn felly yn eithrio unrhyw benderfyniad nad yw'n cynnwys penderfyniad terfynol ar yr hawliad, neu ran o hawliad. Os ydych am ofyn i orchymyn rheoli achos gael ei amrywio neu ei ddirymu, defnyddiwch y ffurflen gais ar gyfer amrywio neu ddirymu gorchymyn.
Mae’n rhaid i chi ofyn i dribiwnlys ailystyried dyfarniad o fewn 14 diwrnod i ddyddiad anfon y dyfarniad atoch.
Os ydych am i’r tribiwnlys ailystyried dyfarniad a anfonwyd atoch dros 14 diwrnod yn ôl rhaid i chi egluro pam bod eich cais yn hwyr.
Nid yw cais i ailystyried yn effeithio ar y terfyn amser ar gyfer apelio i’r Tribiwnlys Apeliadau Cyflogaeth.
Manylion i’w cynnwys yn eich cais:

items: y dyfarniad rydych eisiau iddo gael ei ailystyried
y dyddiad y cyhoeddodd y tribiwnlys y dyfarniad
eich rheswm dros anfon eich cais yn hwyr os anfonwyd y dyfarniad dros 14 diwrnod yn ôl
pam ei fod er budd cyfiawnder i ailystyried y dyfarniad hwn
os dylai’r tribiwnlys amrywio neu ddirymu’r dyfarniad
unrhyw wybodaeth ychwanegol neu ddeunydd nad oes gan y tribiwnlys yn barod i gefnogi eich cais

contentRep.text: [W]Use this form to have a judgment made by a tribunal reconsidered. This may be a judgment made by a judge alone or by a judge sitting with non-legal members.
[W]If reconsideration is necessary in the interests of justice the claimant can ask the tribunal to look at the judgment again.

[W]Only a judgment which finally determines an issue in the claimant’s case can be reconsidered. This therefore excludes any decision that does not comprise a final determination of the claim, or part of a claim. If the claimant wishes to ask for a case management order to be varied or revoked, use the vary or revoke an order application.
[W]The claimant can only ask the tribunal to reconsider a judgment within 14 days of the date the judgment was sent to them or their representative.
[W]If the claimant wants the tribunal to reconsider a judgment that was sent to them over 14 days ago they must explain why their application is late.
[W]A reconsideration application does not affect the time limit for appealing to the Employment Appeal Tribunal.

items: [W]the date the tribunal issued the judgment
[W]the reason for a late application if the judgment was sent over 14 days ago
[W]why it is in the interests of justice to reconsider this judgment
[W]if the tribunal should vary or revoke the judgment
[W]any additional information or material which the tribunal does not already have to support your application
